title: Equipify
description: Minecraft porgression is boring, so what if theres even better tools and armor than netherite?
body:
With this mod, you can choose between armor sets, and give player's more personality. Every armor and tool set does a diferent thing. Currently there are 6 diferent armor sets to choose from, each of them is extremely unique.

**--Infernal Set--**

This armor gives you partial resistence against fire.
The tool set, have natural fire aspect and make enemies explode on death.
You can craft this set with a smithing table: Infernal upgrade + your armor/tool pice + gold ingot.

**--Toxic Set--**

The armor of this set grants you with imunity to various effects, like, you can even eat a pufferfish without any issue.
And the tools will make your enemies be infected with toxic spores, a new effect that will cause poision on your enemies, and if they try to run away, the effect will give them nausea and poison.
You can craft this set with a smithing table: Toxic upgrade + armor/tool pice + red musroom.

**--Spectral Set--**

The armor makes you stronger when you kill.
And the tools steals life from your enemies.
You can craft this set with a smithing table: Spectral upgrade + armor/tool pice + echo shard.

**--Heavy Set--**

The armor is really heavy, as you can notice, you fall a bit faster, and is really resistant against knockback and damage.
The tools on the other side, are... Heavy, they make you walk slower when you have them on hand and they do a lot of damage. Also, remember that the mace has its own mechanics, so we(I) are not gonna make heavy tools act like the mace.
You can craft this set with a smithing table: Heavy upgrade + armor/tool pice + Heavy Core.

**--Thornbloom Set--**

This armor sucks at absorving damage, but it gives a strong poision every time you get hit.
The tools are really fast, at the cost of one damage, but they also give poison.
You can craft this set with a smithing table: Thornbloom upgrade + armor/tool pice + Gold.

**--Void Set--**

Mid stats armor set, but it comes with a really cool ability, just press "c" and you will find out, it also looks awesome. The tools give extra xp when killing, have fun making xp farms even more op than they are.
You can craft this set with a smithing table: Void upgrade + armor/tool pice + Eye of ender for a green color, and dragon´s breath for a purple color.

UPCOMING CONTENT
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
-More Armor Abilities.
-Other Miscellaneos Changes.
</details>
